title: Bauble Dragons
description: A mod that allow you to "carry" your mythic creatures from Ice and Fire with you!
body:
An addon for Bauble Mounts that adds the ability to “carry” dragons with you in Bauble.

**Why is it an addon?**

This feature had to be implemented in a separate mod because of the impossibility to insert this functionality into the main mod.

**Can i use it in Modpack?**

Yes, you can.
